name: modules/blog
description: A self-contained, security-first Laravel blogging package — posts, categories and comments with actions, services, repositories, observers, policies, events, a REST API, CLI, Blade components and optional Livewire. Built on laranail/package-tools.

suggest.laranail/package-management: Load this artifact as a runtime module/plugin (activation, lifecycle hooks, settings) via its module.json / plugin.json.
suggest.livewire/livewire: To use the optional Livewire 4 components (post list, comment form).
suggest.laravel/sanctum: To protect the write REST API routes with token auth (the default api middleware).
suggest.league/commonmark: (^2.4) Render Markdown post bodies to HTML on display (enable blog.processing.markdown).
suggest.laravel/scout: (^10.0) Full-text post search via the 'scout' blog search driver.
suggest.filament/filament: (^4.0) Admin panel resources for posts, categories, tags and comments via BlogPlugin.
suggest.laravel/nova: (^5.0) Nova admin resources for posts, categories, tags and comments.
